beginnerGuide.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Beginner Guide
beginnerGuide.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash is a fast real-time arena game where short matches are decided by movement, timing, positioning, and objective control. The easiest way to improve early is to understand what each mode asks you to do, pick one Cookie to learn properly, and treat ultimates and spell cards as planned tools instead of panic buttons.

steps.title: Understand the CookieRun: OvenSmash match loop first
steps.description: OvenSmash is built around short, tactical arena battles. You control one Cookie at a time, and good movement, ability timing, and teamwork matter more than long grinding sessions.
highlights: Real-time multiplayer arena combat
Short and dynamic matches
Unique Cookie skills and ultimates
Spell cards that can swing fights
Objective-based modes instead of pure kill chasing

steps.title: Play the objective, not just the fight
steps.description: Different modes reward different kinds of pressure. Early losses often happen because new players chase eliminations and ignore the actual win condition.
highlights: Escort the Turtle to the enemy castle or destroy the castle
Capture the center stage to score over time
Collect Jellies and deposit them in the enemy goal
Reach the target elimination count before the opposing team
Be the last player standing in the free-for-all mode
Collect gnomes, build structures, and score points

steps.title: Pick one main Cookie before branching out
steps.description: A strong early habit is to stay on one Cookie long enough to learn attack range, cooldown rhythm, and ultimate timing. Keep one backup pick, but do not swap constantly.
highlights: Learn one main first
Keep a secondary pick for bad matchups or team needs
Do not switch Cookies every few matches
Mechanical comfort is worth more than shallow roster coverage

steps.title: Know your team role in CookieRun: OvenSmash 3v3
steps.description: Beginners perform better when they understand how their Cookie fits into the team. Balanced lineups are usually more consistent than all-damage teams.
highlights: Tanks and frontliners create space and absorb pressure
Damage dealers finish fights and punish bad positioning
Supports keep teammates alive or increase team pressure
Stay near teammates in 3v3 instead of forcing solo fights

steps.title: Use spell cards and ultimates at the right moment
steps.description: Many matches turn on one well-timed shield, heal, freeze, or burst ultimate. Strong timing beats random button use.
highlights: Save big tools for team fights or objective pushes
Use shields before impact, not after you are already collapsing
Use healing when it changes a fight, not after the fight is lost
Cast ultimates when enemies group up or commit to an objective

steps.title: Build progress through consistency
steps.description: Progress comes from steady play and smarter resource use, not from trying to unlock everything immediately. Daily missions and mode variety help you grow faster.
highlights: Complete daily missions
Play different modes to learn map flow
Gradually unlock stronger Cookies and spell cards
Avoid common mistakes: over-aggression, ignoring objectives, wasting ultimates, and switching mains too often

quickTips: Movement and positioning decide more fights than raw damage stats.
Short matches mean every decision counts from the opening seconds.
Spell cards are planned tools, not panic buttons.
Consistent play on one Cookie builds skill faster than roster-hopping.

codes.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Codes
codes.intro: Coupon codes are one of the fastest early sources of free Crystals in CookieRun: OvenSmash. The official redemption flow uses the DevPlay coupon page, and the reward arrives through your in-game mailbox after you claim the code and restart the game.

expiredCodes.title: Expired CookieRun: OvenSmash Codes
expiredCodes.emptyState: No expired CookieRun: OvenSmash codes are listed on the current March 2026 trackers.

redeemSteps.title: How to Redeem CookieRun: OvenSmash Codes

entries.instruction: Launch CookieRun: OvenSmash and complete the tutorial.
Open the menu, go to Settings, then open the Account tab.
Check the DevPlay account information used for the game.
Open the official coupon page at coupon.devplay.com.
Enter your DevPlay Account and the coupon code.
Press Claim Rewards, then restart the game and collect the reward from your mailbox.

entries.purpose: The account tied to your game login
The redeem code you want to claim

tierList.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Tier List
tierList.intro: Tier lists matter more in CookieRun: OvenSmash than in a slow PvE game because your first main shapes your early win rate, resource use, and comfort with the mode rotation. A good first pick should match your preferred role, help in multiple game types, and be worth early upgrade investment.

tiers.summary: Top launch-meta picks with strong all-around value, role impact, or easy conversion into wins.
featuredNotes: Dark Choco Cookie stands out because he can tank, deal damage, and sustain well.
Red Velvet Cookie is valued for displacement and fight control.
Cherry Cookie is a free starter who still performs at a top-tier level.

tiers.summary: Strong picks that reward better positioning, cleaner execution, or a more stable frontline around them.
featuredNotes: Ice Pop Cookie brings excellent crowd control but wants better team spacing.
Blueberry Pie Cookie is a mage who can play aggressively without feeling paper-thin.
Chili Pepper Cookie can clean up fights well if your entry timing is good.

tiers.summary: Playable options with narrower value, simpler kits, or more matchup-dependent performance.
featuredNotes: GingerBrave is straightforward and flexible, but not as impactful as the higher tiers.
Fruit Punch Cookie works, but stronger frontline options are available.
Tiger Lily Cookie needs more setup and feels better later into her progression.

bestBuilds.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Best Builds
bestBuilds.intro: In CookieRun: OvenSmash, a build is not just about raw damage. Your special variant, ultimate version, and Power Biscuit choices all shape how your Cookie enters fights, exits fights, and supports the team objective. The strongest early results usually come from pairing one stable main with disciplined resource spending.

playstyle: Poke with your basic attack before committing.
Dash in, use your ultimate, then dash back out.
Prioritize backline targets and low-HP enemies.
Pair well with a distracting frontliner such as Dark Choco Cookie.
Go in with teammates, apply crowd control, and disengage before enemies unfreeze.
Do not frontline alone like a tank or bruiser.
Play beside a sturdier teammate in team fights.
For a more support-heavy style, Freezing Bat Flip is a strong alternative ultimate.

coreRules: Invest in one main first because Coins are needed in large amounts.
Farm Crystals through quests, events, and redeem codes.
Farm Coins through Cookie Mastery, events, and reward boxes.

playstyle: Use one stable main to learn ranges, cooldowns, and objective timing before spreading upgrades.
Build depth on a proven main first, then add a backup pick.

cookiesList.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Cookies List
cookiesList.intro: Every Cookie in CookieRun: OvenSmash has a defined role, rarity, and set of abilities. This full character index helps you compare options before committing upgrade resources.

cookies.name: Dark Choco Cookie
cookies.description: High sustain bruiser who can tank, deal damage, and survive extended fights.

cookies.name: Red Velvet Cookie
cookies.description: Displacement specialist with strong fight control and disruption abilities.

cookies.name: Madeleine Cookie
cookies.description: Sturdy frontliner who creates space and absorbs pressure for the team.

cookies.name: Rye Cookie
cookies.description: Long-range damage dealer who punishes bad positioning from a distance.

cookies.name: Blue Slushy Cookie
cookies.description: Fast ranged attacker with quick burst damage and solid poke.

cookies.name: String Cheese Cookie
cookies.description: Versatile marksman with consistent damage output across multiple modes.

cookies.name: Latte Cookie
cookies.description: Area-of-effect mage who controls zones and punishes grouped enemies.

cookies.name: Melon Soda Cookie
cookies.description: Team healer who keeps allies alive during objective pushes.

cookies.name: Peppermint Cookie
cookies.description: Defensive support who shields teammates and boosts team survivability.

cookies.name: Peach Cookie
cookies.description: Agile assassin who dives backlines and eliminates high-value targets.

cookies.name: Cherry Cookie
cookies.description: Free starter bomber who still performs at top tier with strong area damage.

cookies.name: Bacon Roll Cookie
cookies.description: Aggressive frontliner who trades well in extended brawls.

cookies.name: Ice Pop Cookie
cookies.description: Crowd control specialist with freeze abilities and team-fight impact.

cookies.name: Strawberry Crepe Cookie
cookies.description: Durable tank with shielding mechanics and frontline presence.

cookies.name: Jerky Cookie
cookies.description: Burst mage with strong combo potential and aggressive playstyle.

cookies.name: Blueberry Pie Cookie
cookies.description: Tanky mage who can play aggressively without feeling fragile.

cookies.name: Chili Pepper Cookie
cookies.description: Fast assassin who cleans up fights with strong entry timing.

cookies.name: GingerBrave
cookies.description: Straightforward and flexible but less impactful than higher-tier bruisers.

cookies.name: Fruit Punch Cookie
cookies.description: Functional tank, though stronger frontline options exist.

cookies.name: Tiger Lily Cookie
cookies.description: Setup-dependent marksman who improves with progression investment.

gameModes.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Game Modes Guide
gameModes.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash features six competitive modes, each with unique objectives and win conditions. Understanding how each mode works is one of the fastest ways to improve your early win rate.

modes.name: Castle Crasher
modes.objective: Escort the Turtle to the enemy castle or destroy their castle before time runs out.
tips: Stay near the Turtle to push it forward.
Eliminate enemies to clear the path.
Coordinate pushes with your team after winning a fight.

modes.name: Drop the Beat
modes.objective: Capture and hold the center stage to score points over time.
tips: Control the center zone as a team.
Group up before contesting the stage.
Use crowd control to force enemies off the point.

modes.name: Jelly Race
modes.objective: Collect Jellies scattered across the map and deposit them in the enemy goal.
tips: Split between collecting and defending your goal.
Carry Jellies as a group for safer deposits.
Target enemy carriers to steal their Jellies.

modes.name: Team Battle
modes.objective: Reach the target elimination count before the opposing team.
tips: Focus fire on one target to secure eliminations quickly.
Stay grouped to avoid getting picked off alone.
Use ultimates during team engagements for maximum impact.

modes.name: Cookie Royale
modes.objective: Be the last Cookie standing in the free-for-all arena.
tips: Play cautiously and let others fight first.
Save your ultimate for the final showdown.
Position near the edge to control space.

modes.name: Gnome Battle
modes.objective: Collect gnomes, build structures, and score more points than the enemy team.
tips: Disrupt enemy builders to slow their score.

currencyGuide.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Currency Guide
currencyGuide.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash uses several currencies that each serve different purposes. Smart spending early prevents wasted resources and keeps your progression efficient.

currencies.name: Crystals
currencies.source: Quests, events, coupon codes, Oven Crown Road
currencies.usage: Summon pulls, premium shop items, and special banners

currencies.name: Coins
currencies.source: Cookie Mastery, events, reward boxes, daily missions
currencies.usage: Cookie upgrades, skill leveling, and Power Biscuit purchases

currencies.name: Soulchips
currencies.source: Duplicate Cookie pulls and Soulchip exchange
currencies.usage: Unlock Cookies and raise Cookie star levels

currencies.name: Tickets
currencies.source: Events, login rewards, and seasonal passes
currencies.usage: Costume draws and special event summons

spendingTips: Invest Coins into one main Cookie before spreading across the roster.
Save Crystals for featured banners with rate-up Cookies you plan to main.
Use coupon codes immediately to maximize early Crystal income.
Complete daily missions every day to maintain steady resource flow.

rolesGuide.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Roles Guide
rolesGuide.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash is a role-based PvP game. Understanding how frontline, damage, control, and support responsibilities translate into winning team play is essential for climbing ranks and winning 3v3 matches.

roles.name: Tank
roles.description: Tanks absorb damage and create space for teammates. They initiate fights, protect squishier allies, and control the frontline.

roles.name: Bruiser
roles.description: Bruisers deal sustained damage while staying durable in extended fights. They trade blows in the frontline and pressure enemies.

roles.name: Marksman
roles.description: Marksmen deal consistent ranged damage from the backline. They punish bad positioning and finish low-HP targets.

roles.name: Mage
roles.description: Mages control zones with area-of-effect abilities. They punish grouped enemies and control team-fight tempo.

roles.name: Assassin
roles.description: Assassins dive into the backline to eliminate high-value targets quickly. They excel at picking off isolated or low-HP enemies.

roles.name: Controller
roles.description: Controllers apply crowd control effects to disrupt enemies. They set up kills for teammates and peel for allies.

roles.name: Support
roles.description: Supports heal and shield teammates, increasing overall team survivability. They enable aggressive plays by keeping the team healthy.

roles.name: Bomber
roles.description: Bombers deal heavy area damage with explosive abilities. They punish grouped enemies and control chokepoints.

ovenCrownRoad.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Oven Crown Road Guide
ovenCrownRoad.intro: The Oven Crown Road is CookieRun: OvenSmash's long-term progression ladder. Climbing it unlocks milestone rewards including Crystals, Coins, Cookie Soulchips, and cosmetic items. Efficient climbing depends on consistent daily play and winning matches.

steps.title: Complete Oven Crown Road milestones regularly
steps.description: Each rank milestone on the Oven Crown Road provides rewards that directly accelerate your Cookie upgrades and summoning power.

steps.title: Win matches to earn Crown Road points faster
steps.description: Winning ranked and casual matches provides the most efficient Crown Road progression. Focus on modes where your main Cookie performs best.

steps.title: Claim milestone rewards immediately
steps.description: Check the Crown Road screen regularly and collect earned rewards. Unclaimed rewards do not compound, so pick them up as soon as possible.

steps.title: Plan upgrades around Crown Road rewards
steps.description: Time your upgrade spending with expected Crown Road payouts. This prevents running out of Coins or Crystals at critical progression points.

summonGuide.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Summon Guide
summonGuide.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash uses several acquisition systems including General Summon, Soulchip Remix, Costume Draw, and box rewards. Understanding how they work helps you spend Crystals and Tickets wisely.

summons.name: General Summon
summons.description: The standard Crystal-based summon pool. Includes all available Cookies and provides the broadest chance at new roster additions.

summons.name: Soulchip Remix
summons.description: A targeted summon that focuses on Soulchips for specific Cookies. Best used when you need star upgrades for a Cookie you already own.

summons.name: Costume Draw
summons.description: A Ticket-based draw for cosmetic skins. Costumes do not affect gameplay stats but provide visual customization for your favorite Cookies.

summons.name: Box Rewards
summons.description: Event and progression boxes that contain mixed rewards including Coins, Crystals, Soulchips, and upgrade materials.

inviteCodes.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Invite Codes
inviteCodes.intro: The invite code system in CookieRun: OvenSmash rewards players who bring friends into the game. Both the inviter and the invited player receive bonus rewards through the social event.

howItWorks.instruction: Find your personal invite code in the Friends menu under the Invite tab.
Share your invite code with friends who have not yet played CookieRun: OvenSmash.
Your friend enters the invite code during the new player tutorial or in the Settings menu.
Both players receive social rewards including Crystals and bonus items.

friendsParty.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Friends & Party Guide
friendsParty.intro: Playing with friends is a core part of CookieRun: OvenSmash. Creating parties and queuing together for 3v3 modes makes coordination easier and matches more fun.

steps.title: Add friends using their player ID or search name
steps.description: Open the Friends menu, tap Add Friend, and enter the player ID or search for their username.

steps.title: Create a party from the lobby
steps.description: Tap the Party button in the main lobby, then invite friends from your friend list.

steps.title: Share your party code for quick joins
steps.description: Your party generates a code that friends can enter to join directly without needing to be on your friend list.

steps.title: Queue together for 3v3 modes
steps.description: Once your party is assembled, select a mode and queue together. Party members are placed on the same team.

ratesGuide.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Rates Guide
ratesGuide.intro: Knowing the actual summon odds, costume draw rates, and battle box drop percentages helps you make informed decisions before spending premium currency in CookieRun: OvenSmash.

costumes.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Costumes Guide
costumes.intro: Costumes in CookieRun: OvenSmash are cosmetic skins obtained through Costume Draws and special events. They change your Cookie's appearance without affecting gameplay stats.

sections.name: How CookieRun: OvenSmash Costumes Work
sections.description: Costumes are purely visual changes applied to your Cookie in battle. They come in Common, Rare, Epic, and Legendary rarity tiers, with higher tiers featuring more dramatic visual effects.

sections.name: Obtaining CookieRun: OvenSmash Costumes
sections.description: Use Costume Draw Tickets to pull from the costume pool. Tickets are earned from events, login rewards, and the Oven Crown Road.

sections.name: CookieRun: OvenSmash Costume Collections
sections.description: Collecting multiple costumes for the same Cookie builds your collection score. Higher collection scores can unlock additional profile rewards.

updates.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Updates
updates.intro: CookieRun: OvenSmash is a live-service PvP game with regular patches, balance changes, and event rotations. Stay current with the latest announcements and content drops.

entries.title: Global Launch
entries.description: CookieRun: OvenSmash launched globally on March 26, 2026, featuring 20 playable Cookies, six game modes, and the Oven Crown Road progression system.

entries.title: Launch Event: Welcome to Platter City
entries.description: Celebrate the global launch with bonus Crystals, a free Cookie selector, daily login rewards, and limited-time missions.

entries.title: Community Channels
entries.description: Follow official patch notes and event announcements through Discord, X/Twitter, YouTube, and the in-game news feed.

troubleshooting.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash Troubleshooting
troubleshooting.intro: If CookieRun: OvenSmash is crashing, failing to connect, or running poorly, follow these steps to resolve the most common launch-period issues.

steps.title: Update CookieRun: OvenSmash to the latest version
steps.description: Check your app store for available updates. Most launch-period crashes are resolved in the first few patches.

steps.title: Check your internet connection
steps.description: CookieRun: OvenSmash requires a stable internet connection for all game modes. Switch between Wi-Fi and mobile data to test connectivity.

steps.title: Clear the app cache
steps.description: Go to your device settings, find CookieRun: OvenSmash in the app list, and clear the cache. This resolves most loading and display issues.

steps.title: Check device compatibility
steps.description: CookieRun: OvenSmash requires iOS 14 or later, or Android 7.0 or later, with at least 3GB RAM for smooth performance.

steps.title: Contact support if issues persist
steps.description: Submit a ticket through the official Help Center with your device model, OS version, and a description of the problem.

faq.title: CookieRun: OvenSmash
faq.subtitle: Frequently asked questions about CookieRun: OvenSmash

questions.question: What is CookieRun: OvenSmash?
questions.answer: CookieRun: OvenSmash is a real-time PvP arena game developed by Devsisters. Players control Cookies in fast-paced 3v3 battles and free-for-all modes set in Platter City.

questions.question: Is CookieRun: OvenSmash free to play?
questions.answer: Yes. CookieRun: OvenSmash is free to download and play on iOS, Android, and PC. It includes optional in-app purchases for cosmetic items and progression boosts.

questions.question: What platforms support CookieRun: OvenSmash?
questions.answer: CookieRun: OvenSmash is available on iOS (App Store), Android (Google Play), and PC. Cross-play is supported across all platforms.

questions.question: How many Cookies are in CookieRun: OvenSmash?
questions.answer: CookieRun: OvenSmash launched with 20 playable Cookies, each with unique abilities, roles, and ultimates. More Cookies are expected to be added in future updates.

questions.question: How do I redeem codes in CookieRun: OvenSmash?
questions.answer: Visit the official DevPlay coupon page at coupon.devplay.com, enter your DevPlay account and the code, then restart the game to collect rewards from your mailbox.

questions.question: What are the best Cookies in CookieRun: OvenSmash?
questions.answer: The strongest launch-meta picks include Dark Choco Cookie, Red Velvet Cookie, Madeleine Cookie, and Cherry Cookie. Check the tier list section for the full ranking.

questions.question: How many game modes does CookieRun: OvenSmash have?
questions.answer: CookieRun: OvenSmash has six game modes: Castle Crasher, Drop the Beat, Jelly Race, Team Battle, Cookie Royale, and Gnome Battle.

questions.question: When did CookieRun: OvenSmash launch?
questions.answer: CookieRun: OvenSmash launched globally on March 26, 2026, developed by Devsisters and published in select regions by VNGGames.
